title: trifolium brutium
intro: Trifolium brutium, also known as Sicilian clover, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trifolium brutium include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Trifolium brutium is typically prepared in herbal teas or infusions, and its leaves can also be used in traditional folk medicine, often in combination with other herbs, to treat various ailments.
